zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注区间突破
zh.content:
ADA/USD当前维持窄幅震荡，价格运行在0.250附近，24小时波动有限，显示市场情绪偏谨慎。现价略高于SMA20均线，说明短线多头仍占一定优势，但整体趋势尚未形成明显单边行情。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持正值，快线位于零轴上方，代表短线动能有所恢复。不过由于MACD信号线数据缺失，趋势确认力度仍偏弱。RSI暂无有效数值，意味着市场方向需要更多成交量配合验证。

关键支撑位可关注0.2492附近，该区域对应日内低点，一旦跌破可能引发进一步回调。上方阻力位集中在0.2506至0.2520区间，若放量突破，则有机会打开新的短线上行空间。

操作策略上，短线交易者可采取区间高抛低吸思路，在支撑附近轻仓布局，并严格设置止损。若价格有效站稳0.2520上方，可考虑顺势跟进多单；若跌破0.2490，则需警惕空头重新主导市场。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano is trading in a narrowly compressed range near 0.2505, reflecting a cautious but slightly constructive market structure. Price action remains above the 20-period simple moving average at 0.24945, suggesting short-term bullish control is still intact despite limited momentum. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.05% indicates low volatility conditions, while the tight intraday range between 0.2492 and 0.2506 highlights temporary equilibrium between buyers and sellers.

The moving average alignment supports a mildly positive outlook as ADA/USD continues to stabilize above near-term trend support. MACD remains positive at 0.0001819, which points to gradual upside momentum building beneath the surface, although the absence of a signal line and RSI reading limits confirmation strength. Even so, the positive MACD value suggests bearish pressure has weakened compared to previous sessions, keeping the market biased toward cautious accumulation rather than aggressive selling.

Immediate support is developing around 0.2490–0.2495, where buyers have repeatedly defended downside attempts. A break below this region could expose ADA toward the psychologically important 0.2470 area. On the upside, resistance appears near 0.2510, followed by a stronger barrier around 0.2530 if bullish momentum accelerates. Since the market is trading close to resistance already, traders should monitor whether volume expands on any breakout attempt before committing to directional positions.

Short-term traders may consider buying controlled pullbacks toward the SMA support zone while maintaining tight risk management below 0.2490. Momentum traders could also watch for a confirmed breakout above 0.2510 as a signal for continuation toward higher resistance levels. However, the currently subdued volatility environment suggests patience is important, as false breakouts remain possible until stronger momentum indicators and broader market participation emerge.
